summary: Tech Debt & Weekly Proof features testing complete. All 3 new features verified: (1) Tech Debt API returns 37 quarantined tests across 5 categories with health score, (2) Weekly Proof API returns 8 weeks of improvement data, (3) CI/CD workflows have rollback, smoke test, and notification steps. Frontend tabs render correctly with all data-testid attributes working.

issues: i18n translation keys showing instead of translated text - known i18n initialization issue from previous iteration

critical_code_review_comments: Backend tech_debt_aggregator.py correctly reads from quarantine_manifest.py and computes categorized counts, effort hours, weekly targets
Backend channel_health_aggregator.py compute_weekly_proof() correctly queries MongoDB collections for week-over-week data
Dashboard router correctly exposes /tech-debt and /channel-health/weekly-proof endpoints
Frontend TechDebtDashboard.jsx properly displays 37 tests, 5 categories, progress bars, health grade D
Frontend WeeklyProofDashboard.jsx properly displays improvement cards, Recharts trend charts, weeks selector
CI/CD ci-cd.yml has proper rollback (kubectl rollout undo), smoke test (/api/health/), and Slack notification steps
CI/CD deploy.yml has DB backup (mongodump), rollback, and notification steps
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 6 tabs verified, Tech Debt and Weekly Proof dashboards render correctly

seed_data_creation: None - used existing quarantine_manifest.py and MongoDB data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tech Debt and Weekly Proof features fully verified. Two new API endpoints working: GET /api/ops/dashboard/tech-debt (returns 37 quarantined tests, 5 categories, health score D/30), GET /api/ops/dashboard/channel-health/weekly-proof (returns 8 weeks of improvement data). Frontend renders at /control-plane with tabs data-testid='tab-tech-debt' and data-testid='tab-weekly-proof'. CI/CD workflows at .github/workflows/ci-cd.yml and deploy.yml have rollback, smoke test, and notification steps.

GET /api/ops/dashboard/tech-debt.returns: total_quarantined=37, total_effort_hours=40.8, total_weekly_target=13, estimated_weeks_to_zero=3, 5 categories, health_score=30, health_grade=D

GET /api/ops/dashboard/channel-health/we.returns: 8 weeks of data with sync_success_rate, drift_count, mttr_hours, sla_compliance, push_latency_p95, improvements object with deltas

frontend_elements.tab-tech-debt: PASS - Teknik Borc tab visible and clickable
frontend_elements.tab-weekly-proof: PASS - Deger Kaniti tab visible and clickable
frontend_elements.debt-categories: PASS - Shows 5 categories with progress bars
frontend_elements.chart-sync-sla-weekly: PASS - Sync & SLA Trendi chart renders
frontend_elements.chart-drift-mttr-weekly: PASS - Drift & MTTR Trendi chart renders
frontend_elements.chart-p95-weekly: PASS - Push Latency p95 Haftalik chart renders
